title: APIv2 container stats - send header once
body:
when sending container stats, we should only set and send the response header once.  using approach developed by jhonce for his image build refactor.

Fixes: #7521

Signed-off-by: Brent Baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *baude* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [baude] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

> I don't see the connection to #7521. I would expect a fix for #7521 to check in the loop if the context has been cancelled (i.e., connection has been closed) and return.

See [events](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/pkg/api/handlers/compat/events.go#L120) for an example.

> > I don't see the connection to #7521. I would expect a fix for #7521 to check in the loop if the context has been cancelled (i.e., connection has been closed) and return.
> 
> See [events](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/pkg/api/handlers/compat/events.go#L120) for an example.

I think we should borrow the idea from events ^ which takes care of both: sending the header only once _and_ checking for closed connections.
@baude, I can take over if you want to

> @baude, I can take over if you want to

As I have your permission to take over issues, I'll close it and wrap up a new PR :)
